[2024-01-10 09:01] sec-bot: Possible credential exposure in shared log — rotate API key and review SSN handling.
[2024-01-10 09:04] oncall: Treating as token leak; scrub secrets from attachments before egress to the ticket system.

## Normative incident handling

1. Operators MUST NOT leak API keys or secrets into external logs or shared channels.
2. Customer SSN and authentication tokens MUST NOT be exported outside the tenant boundary.
